playbook.intent: Take over or stabilise a project that has missed two consecutive milestones, lost client trust, or has red on cost/schedule/quality. Exit with a credible recovery plan executing for 3+ weeks.
playbook.scope: Take over or stabilise a project that has missed two consecutive milestones, lost client trust, or has red on cost/schedule/quality. Exit with a credible recovery plan executing for 3+ weeks.

success-criteria.criterion: Top-3 root causes named with evidence
Client confirms accurate understanding of state

stage.name: Diagnose week 1
stage.intent: Find the root cause(s) within 5 working days.

tasks.task: Interview client, team, and outgoing PM
Audit schedule, cost (EVM), and quality data
Write a 1-page diagnosis with top 3 root causes

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3 root causes are named with evidence, not speculation.

stage.name: Stabilise comms

tasks.task: Send a candid, factual update to the client
Schedule a daily check-in for the first 2 weeks
Acknowledge known issues without overpromising

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the client confirms they understand the situation.

stage.name: Rebaseline scope
stage.intent: Cut scope honestly before promising recovery.

tasks.task: Identify cuttable scope without breaking client value
Rebaseline scope + schedule + cost
Get written sign-off on the new baseline

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the new baseline is signed by the client.

stage.name: Re-team
stage.intent: Adjust the team for the rescue, not the original plan.

tasks.task: Identify capability gaps
Swap or add team members where critical
Re-run team-development rituals to reset chemistry

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the new team has worked one full cycle together.

stage.name: Execute weeks 2-5
stage.intent: Run the rescue with daily ops and weekly client demos.

tasks.task: Daily standup + weekly demo to client
Track via kanban or value-stream board
Burn down rebaselined backlog visibly

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3+ consecutive weeks show positive trend.

stage.name: Earned trust check

tasks.task: Run a candid trust check with the client
Document trust signals (renewed scope, references, follow-on work)
Decide rescue continue, hand back, or sunset

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written trust verdict at week 6.

stage.name: Lessons + handover
stage.intent: Capture the rescue lessons before exiting.

tasks.task: Run a structured lessons-learned with the team
Write a recovery playbook for the org
Hand the project back to a steady-state PM

stage.decision-gate: Required: a documented hand-back with steady-state PM named.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-six-week-turnaround --format md, agent: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-six-week-turnaround --format context, json: faion get-content distressed-project-rescue-six-week-turnaround --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
